name: accounting firms managing 10–50 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–50 clients, manual reconciliation of bank statements causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of bank statements leading to discrepancies

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation of bank statements leading to discrepancies
